body:
Julia,

Adding Cherry Hill visit dates to the shared doc tonight. Let me know if the 20th still works.

— Mark
subject: Re: Household planning doc

body:
Becca,

Draft of Monday kickoff agenda attached. Chen-Morrison and Holloway-Park updates are the two priorities. Want to walk through timelines before the client call Wednesday.

— Mark
subject: Monday kickoff agenda - draft

body:
Marco,

Draft menu for the DiStefano-Grant reception attached. Please look at the passed apps section — the bride flagged the shrimp. Ready to send once you confirm.

— Mark
subject: DiStefano-Grant menu - draft for your review

body:
Tessa,

Draft florals brief for Kaplan-Rivera. Client leaning toward the muted palette — check the mood board on Drive when you get a chance.

— Mark
subject: Kaplan-Rivera florals - initial brief

body:
Sophie,

Let me know when the credit transfer discussion actually happens. Happy to look at the paperwork with you.

Love,
Dad

body:
Ethan,

Mom and I are coordinating pickup for end-of-semester. Send me your exam schedule when you have it.

Love,
Dad
subject: Semester pickup timing

body:
Phil,

Q4 expense reconciliation is ready for your review. Business Amex and vendor deposits reconciled. Anything odd flag by end of week.

— Mark
subject: Q4 expense reconciliation - Campbell Events

body:
Linda,

Rescheduling lunch — moving to next Tuesday, first week is packed. Same time at Cafe Soleille?

— Mark
subject: Re: Lunch

body:
Diane,

We are planning to come by Saturday the 20th. Julia is bringing biscuits. Around 11 work for you?

— Mark
subject: Saturday visit

body:
James,

Call me back when you get a chance. Nothing wrong — just wanted to check in.

— Mark
subject: Quick call?

body:
Hi Chen-Morrison team,

Draft of the 90-day timeline attached for your review. Please note the vendor deposit deadline on page 3.

Best,
Mark Campbell
Campbell Events
subject: Chen-Morrison wedding - 90 day timeline

body:

Draft venue walk-through notes attached from last Saturday's site visit. Two flagged items for follow-up: parking capacity and rental power spec.

Best,
Mark Campbell

body:
Hi Kaplan-Rivera team,

Draft budget worksheet attached. Column D shows current commitments; column E is your remaining discretionary. Happy to walk through on Wednesday's call.

Best,
Mark

body:

Draft playlist notes attached from the DJ. Please listen through the first-dance selections and confirm one by Friday.

Best,

body:
Pastor Henderson,

Just wanted to reach out — Julia and I have been meaning to make it back on a Sunday. Hope you and the parish are well.

Warmly,
Mark
subject: Long overdue hello

body:

Draft nomination for the spring showcase panel attached. Adding a note that I cannot commit to more than one session this year.

Best,
Mark Campbell
Campbell Events
subject: GPEPA spring showcase - nomination draft

body:

Added therapy appointment slot options to the shared doc. First Wednesday of the month probably works best given my schedule. Will book once you confirm.
